mapper.select: SELECT k.id, k.title, k.content, k.summary, k.category_id, c.name AS category_name, k.view_count, k.is_vectorized, k.created_at, k.updated_at, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name ORDER BY t.id SEPARATOR ',') AS tags_str FROM knowledge k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN knowledge_tag kt ON k.id = kt.knowledge_id LEFT JOIN tag t ON kt.tag_id = t.id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE k.id = #{id} AND k.deleted = 0 GROUP BY k.id
